runTitle: Production deploy validation - v8.12.117 boot flow and shutdown expiry

expertAssessments.rationale: GitLab tag pipeline, Vercel deploy smoke, Cloud Run deploy smoke, frontend health/version, Cloud Run health, and free-tier guardrails all passed for v8.12.117.
Local regression coverage included system boot intent, landing start navigation, Redis running-flag TTL behavior, type-check, lint, quick tests, and contract tests before release.
Release propagation and runtime state were verified through /api/version, /api/health, Cloud Run /health, GitLab pipeline inspection, Vercel usage, and Cloud Run resource guard checks.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after v8.12.117 production deploy: effective=3.8906 USD, billed=0.0000 USD, chargeCount=3654.
Cloud Run guardrails passed: maxScale=1, concurrency=16, timeoutSeconds=300, cpu=1, memory=512Mi, cpu-throttling=true, latestReadyRevision=ai-engine-00614-xf4.

notes: Code commit 0eb30a1e4 restored the boot loading page after the landing system start button by adding a short-lived one-time sessionStorage boot intent.
Code commit 0eb30a1e4 changed the Redis system:running true flag to expire after 1800 seconds, matching the local 30-minute auto-shutdown policy for serverless/API state.
Pre-deploy local validation passed: targeted Vitest boot/Redis tests, npm run type-check, npm run lint, npm run test:quick, npm run test:contract, and git diff --check.
GitLab branch validation pipeline 2583870910 passed for the code commit.
GitLab tag pipeline 2583876860 completed successfully for v8.12.117.
Vercel production /api/version returned v8.12.117 and commit 13a501c403565ada062815d7f10cca66258bc1d1.
Cloud Run /health returned status ok and version 8.12.116; unchanged AI Engine version is expected because this release did not change cloud-run/ai-engine implementation metadata.
No secret values or API keys were recorded.
